message:
fix(embed,fusion): block path traversal in model manifests and harden searcher indexing

- model_manifest.rs: validate() now rejects file names containing '..'
  path traversal or absolute path components. Previously, a malicious
  manifest could write files outside the staging directory via names
  like "../../overwrite_target".

- searcher.rs: replaced unchecked doc_ids()[idx] indexing with
  doc_ids.get(idx) to prevent panics if the fast index returns a
  stale index that exceeds doc_ids bounds.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
